suite_name: Login functionality is verify with all possible scenarios. postive , negative, edge cases,

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application dashboard/home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the Login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the Email/Username field
Enter the valid password in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify the logged-in user's name or email is displayed in the header/profile section
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is successful, confirming email field is case-insensitive. User is redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the Login page is displayed
Enter 'TESTD1051@GMAIL.COM' in the Email/Username field (uppercase version of the valid email)
Enter the valid password in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify no error message is displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with email address containing uppercase letters

positive_scenarios.expected_result: After correcting the password, the user is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the Email/Username field
Enter an incorrect password in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials
Clear the Password field
Enter the correct valid password in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login after previously failed attempt

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Password characters are masked during input and login is successful
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the Login page is displayed
Click on the Password field
Enter the valid password in the Password field
Verify the entered characters are masked (displayed as dots or asterisks)
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the Email/Username field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify successful login and redirection to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Password field masks entered characters

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Password visibility toggle works correctly and login is successful
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter the valid password in the Password field
Click the 'Show Password' toggle/eye icon
Verify the password is now visible in plain text
Click the 'Hide Password' toggle/eye icon again
Verify the password is masked again
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the Email/Username field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify successful login and redirection to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Show/Hide password toggle functionality during valid login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All login page UI elements render correctly and login is functional
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the Login page title or heading is displayed
Verify the Email/Username input field is present and enabled
Verify the Password input field is present and enabled
Verify the 'Login' / 'Submit' button is present and clickable
Verify any 'Forgot Password' link is present if applicable
Verify any 'Sign Up' / 'Register' link is present if applicable
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the Email/Username field
Enter the valid password in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify successful login
positive_scenarios.title: Login page loads correctly and displays all UI elements

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is triggered via the Enter key and user is successfully redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the Email/Username field
Press the 'Tab' key to move focus to the Password field
Enter the valid password in the Password field
Press the 'Enter' key on the keyboard
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify no error message is displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login using keyboard Enter key submission

negative_scenarios.expected_result: An appropriate validation error is displayed and the user is not logged in
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the Email/Username field empty
Enter the valid password in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify an error message such as 'Email is required' or 'Username is required' is displayed
Verify the user remains on the Login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty Email/Username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: An appropriate validation error is displayed and the user is not logged in
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the Email/Username field
Leave the Password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify an error message such as 'Password is required' is displayed
Verify the user remains on the Login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty Password field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Validation errors for both empty fields are displayed and login is prevented
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the Email/Username field empty
Leave the Password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify validation error messages are displayed for both fields
Verify the user remains on the Login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with both Email and Password fields empty

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Authentication fails and an error message is displayed without revealing whether the username or password is incorrect
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the Email/Username field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify an error message such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'Incorrect username or password' is displayed
Verify the user remains on the Login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with incorrect password for valid username

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Authentication fails with an appropriate error message for an unregistered email
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'nonexistentuser_xyz_999@gmail.com' in the Email/Username field
Enter any password (e.g., 'SomePassword@123') in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify an error message such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'User not found' is displayed
Verify the user remains on the Login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with unregistered/non-existent email

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Email format validation error is displayed and login is not attempted
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'invalidemail@@domain' in the Email/Username field
Enter the valid password in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify a validation error message such as 'Enter a valid email address' is displayed
Verify the user remains on the Login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Whitespace-only inputs are rejected with appropriate validation errors and login is prevented
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter '     ' (spaces only) in the Email/Username field
Enter '     ' (spaces only) in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify validation error messages are displayed (fields should be treated as empty)
Verify the user remains on the Login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with whitespace-only values in email and password fields

negative_scenarios.expected_result: SQL injection attempt is handled safely; login is denied and no sensitive information is leaked
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter ''' OR '1'='1' --' in the Email/Username field
Enter any value (e.g., 'password123') in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the application does not authenticate the user
Verify no database error or stack trace is exposed to the user
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed and user remains on the Login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in the email field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: XSS payload is not executed; input is sanitized and the application remains secure
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter '<script>alert("XSS")</script>' in the Email/Username field
Enter any value (e.g., 'password123') in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify no JavaScript alert or script is executed
Verify the input is sanitized and an appropriate error message is displayed
Verify the user remains on the Login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with XSS payload in the email field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application gracefully handles excessively long input and displays an appropriate error without crashing
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a string of 300 characters as the email (e.g., 'aaaaaaa...@domain.com') in the Email/Username field
Enter the valid password in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the application handles the input gracefully without crashing
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid email' or 'Email too long')
Verify the user remains on the Login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with an extremely long email address (boundary/overflow test)

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application implements brute force protection such as account lockout, CAPTCHA, or rate limiting after multiple failed login attempts
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the Email/Username field
Enter 'WrongPassword1' in the Password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button and verify error message
Repeat the above steps with 'WrongPassword2', 'WrongPassword3', 'WrongPassword4', 'WrongPassword5' (5 consecutive failed attempts)
Verify that after multiple failures the account is locked, a CAPTCHA appears, or a cooldown message is displayed (e.g., 'Too many attempts, please try again later')
Verify the user remains on the Login page
negative_scenarios.title: Brute force protection — multiple consecutive failed login attempts
